name: Robusto Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Bag egg noodles; cook, drain
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken breasts in crockpot.
2. Pour Italian dressing over the chicken.
3. Cover and cook on LOW for 7 hours or HIGH for 3 1/2 hours.
4. Remove chicken from the crockpot and turn off the appliance.
5. Add half of the sour cream to the chicken and stir until dissolved.
6. Add the remaining sour cream and Parmesan cheese to the noodles and mix until dissolved.
7. Serve chicken over the noodles.
8. Pour warm Italian dressing over top.
9. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese to taste.
